entity_types.name: ArchaeologicalSite
entity_types.description: A place where evidence of past human activity is preserved, which has been, or may be, investigated using the discipline of archaeology.

entity_types.name: Structure
entity_types.description: A building or other object constructed from several parts.

entity_types.name: ScholarlyView
entity_types.description: An opinion or perspective held by academics or researchers.

entity_types.name: Concept
entity_types.description: An abstract idea or general notion.

entity_types.name: TimePeriod
entity_types.description: A defined span of time, often associated with historical or geological eras.

relation_groups.name: Location and Identification
relation_groups.description: Relations describing the geographical placement and identification of archaeological sites and structures.

relation_groups.name: Description and Characteristics
relation_groups.description: Relations detailing the features and characteristics of structures and sites.

relation_groups.name: Research and Impact
relation_groups.description: Relations describing the influence of discoveries on scholarly understanding.

relation_groups.name: Temporal Relations
relation_groups.description: Relations describing the time periods associated with archaeological sites or events.

relations.name: dated_to
relations.description: Indicates the time period to which an archaeological site or its main occupation is dated.
